name: Pricing Tiers
description: A focused pricing-tier comparison with two to four tiers, one optional 'most popular' tier emphasised, inclusive and excluded feature lines, and per-tier CTAs — designed for SaaS, services, and subscription products that sell through a clear price page.

descriptions.descriptive: Side-by-side pricing cards with disciplined typography, monospaced price numerals, and a dark featured tier that pulls focus through contrast rather than ornament. Inclusive features render with a primary-tinted check; excluded ones with a muted X — making scanability the first job.
descriptions.usage: Anchor a SaaS or service site where the buying decision turns on plan comparison. Place near the bottom of the page after problem framing and feature deep-dives, then follow with FAQ to absorb objections before the final CTA.
descriptions.audienceFit: B2B SaaS, agencies with productised services, fintech subscriptions, and creative tooling. Suits evaluators who scan plans before reading copy and need price + scope visible above the fold of the section.
